# Benny & Penny — A Tech Company: Full Context

## Organization

Benny & Penny is the development and design studio of Hamilton Pinto Jr. The studio delivers custom software architecture, API and CRM integrations, business consulting, brand and web development, go-to-market systems, and publishing solutions. The studio is named for and proudly motivated by Hamilton's children, Benny and Penny.

Website: https://www.bennyandpenny.com
Contact: hello@bennyandpenny.com
Location: Southern California

## Services

- Software architecture and custom platform builds
- API, CRM, telephony, systems, and business-intelligence integrations
- Business consulting and operational systems
- Marketing, brand design, visual identity, and web development
- Go-to-market and launch systems
- Publishing and production workflows

## Founder

Hamilton Pinto Jr. is a software architect, creative technologist, business consultant, and publisher. He holds a BA in Visual Communications and has more than two decades of architecture and design experience. He has opened and supported more than 60 establishments across financial services, restaurants, law, medicine, and professional services throughout Southern California.

## Ventures

- XBeton: https://www.xbeton.com/
- Advantage First Financial: https://www.advantagefirst.com/
- American Colonial Capital: https://acc.capital/
- Benny & Penny Adventures: https://www.bennyandpennyadventures.com/
- Mercury Call Desk: https://mercurycalldesk.com/

## Accessibility

Benny & Penny is working toward WCAG 2.2 Level AA as a design and engineering target. Accessibility improvements are ongoing; the site does not claim zero defects or guaranteed legal compliance.

Accessibility statement: https://www.bennyandpenny.com/accessibility
Accessibility Markdown mirror: https://www.bennyandpenny.com/accessibility.md
Accessibility support: hello@bennyandpenny.com
